name: Beef Stroganoff Bermuda
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the stock until reduced to 1/4 of its original amount (2 cups to 1/2 cup), then set aside.
2. Season the beef with salt and pepper. Melt butter and sauté the beef, then set aside.
3. Heat oil, add onion, bell peppers, and pickles, and sauté for approximately three minutes. Remove from heat, add brandy, and ignite.
4. When flames subside, return to heat and add stock, cream, and paprika. Simmer until reduced to the desired consistency.
5. Cook fettuccine according to package instructions and drain.
6. Add beef, lemon juice, and Tabasco to the cream sauce. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Spoon over fettuccine and garnish with sour cream and chopped parsley.
